contextual.title: Strong Heart Study
contextual.text:
Summary: To determine morbidity and mortality from cardiovascular disease among American Indians and to compare cardiovascular disease risk factor levels among Indian groups living in different geographic areas.
Inclusion criteria: No eligibility criteria
Exclusion criteria:

metadata.diseases: ['Cardiovascular Diseases', 'Heart Diseases', 'Atherosclerosis', 'Asthma', 'Carotid Artery Diseases', 'Coronary Disease', 'Hypercholesterolemia', 'Hypertension', 'Diabetes Mellitus', 'Obesity']
metadata.brief_summary: To determine morbidity and mortality from cardiovascular disease among American Indians and to compare cardiovascular disease risk factor levels among Indian groups living in different geographic areas.
